issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and other workflows
issues.desc: HAs and TCs were receiving double tasks for Loan Simple leads across multiple workflows including post-referral and pre-referral. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and resolved the association/filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close out the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-enrolling deals flipped back from terminated status
issues.desc: When a deal was marked Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage after a contract termination, and then moved back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was missing from the workflow's re-enrollment criteria. Madelaine added it as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that went through a stage flip back to Offer Accepted during the impact window to ensure TC tasks are generated.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks firing for deals marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred, indicating the workflow was not properly suppressing or unenrolling these records. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters on March 9th to address this.
issues.workaround: Dismiss any stale check-in tasks received for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: LO name not updating in automated emails after loan officer change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO's name instead of the updated one. The issue was identified as a product-level data sync problem. Luis resolved the issue on March 13th.
issues.workaround: Manually send any affected agent or client emails with the correct LO information for deals where the LO was changed during the impact window.

issues.title: MRC Offer Accepted deals not enrolling TC workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering enrollment into the TC workflow, meaning TCs received no tasks. HubSpot support was consulted and a fix was confirmed on April 1st. The root cause was not explicitly stated but may have been related to missing lender assignment on MRC deals.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were moved to Offer Accepted between approximately February and April 1st to generate the appropriate TC tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not generating tasks after referral acceptance
issues.desc: A referral made and accepted on March 18th did not trigger any tasks in the post-referral workflow. The root cause was an error in how data was being pulled, which prevented the workflow filter from evaluating correctly. The issue was escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: Manually review and complete any outstanding post-referral tasks for deals referred around or after March 18th that show no workflow task history.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent in Offer Accepted stage without credit amount populated
issues.desc: An SMS notifying buyers of their credit amount was incorrectly triggering in the Offer Accepted stage before closing information had been submitted, resulting in a message with a blank or missing credit amount. The SMS should only send in the Sale Pending stage once the credit amount is calculable. The issue was confirmed as a Dash-triggered communication and escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: Manually send a corrected buyer credit communication to any buyers who received the incomplete SMS during the Offer Accepted stage in the impact window.
